agent_number.description: Agent identifier (integer preferred; string digits accepted for legacy files).

webhook_url.description: Full n8n (or other) webhook URL for E2E checks.

built_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the agent artefact was built.

workflow_id.description: Optional n8n workflow id (e.g. n8n UI id).

dependencies.description: Optional list of upstream agents or external deps.

webhook_test_payload.description: Optional JSON object POSTed to webhook_url during validation (default: {}).
